description_long: This is a compact, two-seater armchair with a solid, boxy silhouette and a deep brown color. The armchair features thick, padded armrests and a straight, high backrest that extends the full width of the seat. The seat and backrest appear to be well-cushioned, providing comfort and support. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving it a modern and understated look. The legs are short, block-shaped, and dark, elevating the chair slightly off the ground. This armchair would be suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, parks, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, brown, two-seater armchair with thick padded armrests, a straight high backrest, and short block legs. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick armrest and the full height of the backrest, with the seat cushion visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both armrests, the wide seat area, and the straight backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and seat depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned backrest and the two block legs.
attribute_armrest_design: thick, padded and upholstered rectangular armrests
attribute_backrest_style: straight, high, and fully upholstered backrest
